reviews.text:
I first spoke with Ryan, the person in charge at Reno, back in May. He was very patient and spent a long time discussing things with us. After moving into our new home, I invited a few other companies for quotes, but in the end, I still chose Renostars.

Their price wasn’t the lowest, but the quote was clear and transparent. During the renovation, there were occasional extra charges for additional work, but they were reasonable.

The workers were also great—they showed up early every day and even stayed late sometimes. If any issues came up during the renovation, I just mentioned them in the WeChat group, and they responded quickly. Jasper was mainly responsible for the on-site work, and he suggested adding an extra pot light. It turned out to be a great idea—the final result looks fantastic.

We worked with Reno Stars Construction on a partial renovation of our townhouse (2.5 bathrooms, kitchen, and entry tile work) and were extremely happy with the experience. The team of Ryan, Sylvia and Jasper was professional, communicative, and excellent problem solvers. As a bonus, they delivered the project well ahead of schedule.

We actually recommended them to a friend before our renovation was even completed, based solely on the outstanding customer service. High-quality work and a smooth, stress-free process. We would absolutely recommend Reno Stars Construction.

We hired Reno Stars for a partial renovation of our main bathroom and we're very pleased with their process and the result. Sylvia was responsive and easy to communicate with, the team responded quickly and effectively to our feedback, and we couldn't be happier with how our bathroom looks now! We also found that their pricing was very fair and transparent. Overall we have nothing negative to say about the company or their workers, they made the renovation process simple. We'll definitely be considering Reno Stars again for when we do more renovations in the future.

We recently needed a complete condo remodel. I stumbled through googling for contractors in Vancouver and landed on a Gold Mine of RenoStars! Their professionalism, speed and attention to details made the whole reno simple. As I was not local to Vancouver,  Ryan, Jasper went above and beyond, taking care of all the logistics while keeping me up to date of the progress. They also made ways during the two months of reno when I visited, ensuring that I had a room within the remodeling to stay at and keeping to their commitment of schedule. Absolutely recommend this team to anyone needing a small or big reno in Vancouver area. Wish they had a team where I live too! 😊

Reno Stars completed a full renovation of our townhouse, including replacing the entire flooring, stairs, kitchen cabinets, tiles, lighting, and reworking the bathrooms. The quality of their work is excellent, and the pricing was very reasonable for the scope of the project. Communication was great — they were always responsive and kept us updated throughout the process. The team was efficient, professional, and delivered high-quality results. Highly recommend Reno Stars for any home renovation project.
